query:
INSERT INTO agents (name, description, domain, capabilities, status, is_built_in, is_custom, webhook_url, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES
  (
    'Portfolio Monitor',
    'Tracks portfolio company performance, flags KPI deviations, generates LP updates, and monitors exit readiness across your investment portfolio.',
    'Finance',
    '["portfolio-tracking","lp-reporting","kpi-monitoring","exit-readiness","investment-analysis"]',
    'active',
    1,
    0,
    NULL,
    UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
    UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
  ),
  (
    'Turnaround Planner',
    'Diagnoses operational and financial distress, builds 100-day turnaround plans, tracks restructuring milestones, and monitors recovery KPIs for enterprise clients.',
    'Enterprise',
    '["turnaround-planning","restructuring","operational-recovery","kpi-tracking","financial-diagnosis"]',
    'active',
    1,
    0,
    NULL,
    UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
    UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
  );
